teaching.role: Teaching Assistant, Organic Chemistry I & Lab
teaching.description: Mentored 120+ undergraduates; developed supplemental materials improving exam performance by 15%.

summary: PhD chemist/materials scientist with 6+ years in polymer and thin-film materials characterization, failure analysis, and process-property optimization (FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, TGA/DSC, QCM-D, GPC/SEC, electrochemistry). Currently leading DOE-guided bio-based polymer process development and translating material-quality data into reproducible scale-up specifications.

bullets: Lead DOE-guided bio-based polymer process development, converting material-quality data into reproducible process windows, scale-up specifications, and SOP-ready controls.

Assessed reliability risks in functional electrochromic materials by identifying degradation, delamination, and redox-instability failure modes across 15+ material variants using spectroscopy, electrochemistry, thermal analysis, and MS.
Co-led AFOSR-funded thin-film coating process development, linking CVD/surface preparation to morphology, interface quality, optical performance, and process reproducibility.
Developed and optimized CVD polymer thin-film deposition with DOE strategies and in-situ QCM-D monitoring to define growth kinetics and reproducible process controls.
Managed characterization/process-development lab operations for a 15-member group; implemented calibration, SOP, and safety systems that improved instrument uptime by 30%.

projects.title: Electrochromic Material Reliability Study
projects.description: Mapped structure, purity, stability, and failure behavior across functional organic materials using orthogonal characterization and stress-test logic.
projects.tech: FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, CV, TGA/DSC, NMR, GPC, MS

projects.title: AFOSR Defense Thin-Film Coatings
projects.description: Established process-property relationships for CVD/surface-preparation workflows and reproducible high-performance coating conditions.
projects.tech: CVD, QCM-D, surface prep, thin films

projects.title: Bio-Based Polymer Scale-Up Process
projects.description: Defined DOE-guided process windows and material-quality specifications for reproducible polymer scale-up.

skills.Reliability & Failure Analysis: Failure mode identification, root cause analysis, material degradation, stress-test design, design and process mitigation, FMEA principles
skills.Characterization: FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, ellipsometry, GPC/SEC, LC-MS, GC-MS, NMR, QCM-D, TGA, DSC, cyclic voltammetry
skills.Statistical: DOE, SPC, JMP (basic), Python (basic), Excel, statistical data analysis
skills.Materials: Polymers, biopolymers, organic/organometallic materials, thin films, CVD coatings, surface functionalization
skills.Process: Process development, scale-up specifications, SOPs, technical reports, reproducibility studies
